issue.title: metabot.gg
issue.body:
### Issue URL (Anti Adblock Script) [https://metabot.gg](https://adguardteam.github.io/AnonymousRedirect/redirect.html?url=https%3A%2F%2Fmetabot.gg) ### Comment > Seems to be an issue where the Adblock detector masks itself by not having a class name, making itself difficult to detect. ### Screenshots
Screenshot 1 ![Screenshot 1](https://cdn.adguardcdn.com/sitereports/9160s9ctm98oc0008w4kck4s8oo8cws7upar03zreg.png?nc=1)
### System configuration | Information | Value | |-------------|-------| AdGuard product: | AdGuard for Mac v2.18.0.2089 System version: | `macOS Tahoe 26.4.1` Browser: | Safari Filters: | **Ad Blocking:**
AdGuard Base filter

**Privacy:**
AdGuard Tracking Protection filter

**Annoyances:**
AdGuard Cookie Notices filter,
AdGuard Popups filter,
AdGuard Other Annoyances filter,
Fanboy's Annoyances

**Security:**
Dandelion Sprout's Anti-Malware List,
Online Malicious URL Blocklist Tracking protection: | **General**:
Block trackers,
Hide your search queries,
Send Do-Not-Track header

**Tracking Methods**:
Self-destructing third-party cookies (180h),
Disable cache for third-party requests

**Browser API**:
Block WebRTC,
Block Push API,
Block Location API

**Miscellaneous**:
Protect against DPI DNS filtering: | server: `https://big.oisd.nl`
filters: `AdGuard DNS Filter` Browsing Security: | enabled Browsing Security statistics: | disabled Userscripts: | `AdGuard Extra`
`Adguard Popup Blocker`
`AdGuard Assistant` Userstyles: | disabled Other extensions used: | `ProtonVpn` ### Issue configuration [Import](https://reports.adguard.com/settings/import.html?product_type=mac&product_version=2.18.0.2089&system_version=macOS+Tahoe+26.4.1&browser=safari&filters=2.3.18.19.259.208.21.122&dns_servers=https%3A%2F%2Fbig.oisd.nl&userscripts=AdGuard+Extra%0AAdguard+Popup+Blocker%0AAdGuard+Assistant&dns.filters=AdGuard+DNS+Filter&dns.filters_enabled=true&dns.enabled=true&browsing_security.enabled=true&browsing_security.statistics_enabled=false&stealth.enabled=true&stealth.webrtc=true&stealth.push=true&stealth.location=true&stealth.hide_search_queries=true&stealth.DNT=true&stealth.referrer=&stealth.dpi=true&stealth.third_party_cookies=180&stealth.disable_third_party_cache=true&stealth.block_trackers=true)
